---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for Vizorix
title: 'feat: [Short description of the feature]'
labels: ['enhancement', 'triage']
assignees: []

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. *I'm frustrated when...*)

**Describe the Solution You'd Like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Scope of the Feature**
Which modules does this impact?
- [ ] `apps/web` (Client / UI)
- [ ] `apps/api` (Backend Orchestrator)
- [ ] `packages/execution-engine` (Sandbox Sandbox Runner)
- [ ] `packages/visualization-core` (Trace Event Parsing)
- [ ] `packages/ai-core` (AI Explanation Generator)
- [ ] `packages/ui-components` (Design System Primitives)
- [ ] Other: [e.g. infrastructure/Docker/Nginx]

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, designs, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
